summary_en: FY2026/12 dividend per share raised to ¥15.50 (on stock-split-adjusted basis), from ¥15.00 prior forecast. Comprises ¥7.50 (H1/2026) and ¥4.00 (H2/2026, pre-split equivalent ¥8.00). 1-for-2 stock split executed; increase driven by strong earnings progress and shareholder return policy emphasis.
title_en: Notice of Revision (Increase) to Dividend Forecast for FY2026/12
translation_en_brief: Broadleaf Co., Ltd. announced on May 20, 2026 a revision to its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending December 2026. The company raised the full-year dividend per share from ¥15.00 (announced February 12, 2026) to ¥15.50 on a stock-split-adjusted basis, representing a net increase of ¥0.50 per share. The dividend comprises an interim dividend of ¥7.50 per share (unchanged, as it applies to pre-split share count) and a year-end dividend of ¥4.00 per share (equivalent to ¥8.00 on a pre-split basis). The revision was prompted by execution of a 1-for-2 stock split and solid progress against earnings forecasts. The company considers shareholder returns a key strategic priority while maintaining internal reserves for business expansion and financial soundness.
